def negative_alert_or_slo_threshold_hardcoded_inside_application_logic():
    rule_id = "alert_or_slo_threshold_hardcoded_inside_application_logic"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "SLO error rate or latency threshold hardcoded in application code instead of external configuration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
